message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The previous full model met the size limit but only reached 0.5864 accuracy, so no final `/app/model.bin` was saved. We need to retrain with improved preprocessing and hyperparameters while keeping the model under 150MB and at least 0.62 accuracy. To avoid blocking the shell, training should run in the background with unbuffered logs. The new approach will use full 650k training rows with minimal normalization (preserve punctuation/case mostly, only normalize whitespace), stronger fastText hyperparameters, quantization fallback if needed, and final verification.",
  "plan": "Create and launch /app/run_train3.py in the background. The script will:
1. Read all train and test Parquet rows and write new fastText-format files with minimal normalization.
2. Train a supervised fastText model on all 650k rows with dim=120, epoch=25, lr=0.7, wordNgrams=3, minCount=2, bucket=250000, loss=softmax.
3. Evaluate on the provided test set.
4. If the full model is under 150MB and accuracy >=0.62, save it as /app/model.bin.
5. Otherwise try quantization candidates and save the first quantized model meeting both constraints.
6. Log progress to /app/train3.log.
Then print the process PID and show initial log output.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/run_train3.py <<'PY'
import os, re, time
import pandas as pd
import fasttext

TRAIN_PARQUET='data/train-00000-of-00001.parquet'
TEST_PARQUET='data/test-00000-of-00001.parquet'
TRAIN_FT='/app/train3.ft.txt'
TEST_FT='/app/test3.ft.txt'
MODEL_PATH='/app/model.bin'
FULL_PATH='/app/model_full3.bin'
QTMP='/app/model_qtmp3.bin'

def norm_text(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = str(s)
    s = s.replace('\r', ' ').replace('\n', ' ').replace('\t', ' ')
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def write_ft(df, path):
    n = 0
    with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for lab, txt in zip(df['label'].tolist(), df['text'].tolist()):
            t = norm_text(txt)
            if not t:
                continue
            f.write(f'__label__{int(lab)} {t}\n')
            n += 1
    return n

def evaluate(m, path):
    n, p, r = m.test(path)
    print(f'{path}: n={n} precision@1={p:.4f} recall@1={r:.4f}', flush=True)
    return p

print('Reading parquet...', flush=True)
train = pd.read_parquet(TRAIN_PARQUET, columns=['label','text']).reset_index(drop=True)
test = pd.read_parquet(TEST_PARQUET, columns=['label','text']).reset_index(drop=True)
print(f'train {train.shape} test {test.shape}', flush=True)

print('Writing fastText files...', flush=True)
train_count = write_ft(train, TRAIN_FT)
test_count = write_ft(test, TEST_FT)
print(f'rows train={train_count} test={test_count}', flush=True)

print('Training model...', flush=True)
t0 = time.time()
model = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input=TRAIN_FT,
    epoch=25,
    lr=0.7,
    wordNgrams=3,
    dim=120,
    minCount=2,
    bucket=250000,
    ws=5,
    loss='softmax',
    thread=os.cpu_count() or 4,
    verbose=2
)
print(f'train seconds={round(time.time()-t0,1)}', flush=True)

test_acc = evaluate(model, TEST_FT)
model.save_model(FULL_PATH)
full_size = os.path.getsize(FULL_PATH) / 1024 / 1024
print(f'full size MB={full_size:.2f} test={test_acc:.4f}', flush=True)

saved = False
if full_size < 150 and test_acc >= 0.62:
    os.replace(FULL_PATH, MODEL_PATH)
    saved = True
    print(f'SELECTED full model: size MB={os.path.getsize(MODEL_PATH)/1024/1024:.2f} test={test_acc:.4f}', flush=True)
else:
    for cutoff in [1000000, 500000, 300000, 200000, 100000, 50000]:
        print(f'Quantizing cutoff={cutoff}...', flush=True)
        qm = fasttext.load_model(FULL_PATH)
        try:
            qm.quantize(input=TRAIN_FT, qnorm=True, retrain=True, cutoff=cutoff, epoch=8, lr=0.3)
        except Exception as e:
            print('quantize failed', repr(e), flush=True)
            continue
        qt = evaluate(qm, TEST_FT)
        qm.save_model(QTMP)
        qs = os.path.getsize(QTMP) / 1024 / 1024
        print(f'quantized cutoff={cutoff} size MB={qs:.2f} test={qt:.4f}', flush=True)
        if qs < 150 and qt >= 0.62:
            os.replace(QTMP, MODEL_PATH)
            saved = True
            print(f'SELECTED quantized model: cutoff={cutoff} size MB={os.path.getsize(MODEL_PATH)/1024/1024:.2f} test={qt:.4f}', flush=True)
            break
        if os.path.exists(QTMP):
            os.remove(QTMP)

if saved:
    final = fasttext.load_model(MODEL_PATH)
    final_test = evaluate(final, TEST_FT)
    final_size = os.path.getsize(MODEL_PATH) / 1024 / 1024
    print(f'FINAL model={MODEL_PATH} size MB={final_size:.2f} test acc={final_test:.4f}', flush=True)
    print('OK' if final_size < 150 and final_test >= 0.62 else 'NOTOK', flush=True)
else:
    os.replace(FULL_PATH, MODEL_PATH)
    print(f'WARNING saved fallback model size MB={os.path.getsize(MODEL_PATH)/1024/1024:.2f} test={test_acc:.4f}', flush=True)

for tmp in [FULL_PATH, QTMP]:
    if os.path.exists(tmp):
        os.remove(tmp)
PY
nohup python3 -u /app/run_train3.py > /app/train3.log 2>&1 &
echo "started training pid $!"
sleep 3
tail -20 /app/train3.log
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ]
}
